creator: tz@freebsd.org
text:
Hello,

can you please check your update? I tested it right now and it does not build with poudriere.

It fails with:

=== Start ===

gmake[4]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/monit/work/monit-5.21.0/libmonit/test'
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/monit/work/monit-5.21.0/libmonit'
gmake[3]: Entering directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/monit/work/monit-5.21.0'
no  doc/monit.pod > monit.1
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I./src    -DFREEBSD -DSYSCONFDIR="\"/usr/local/etc\"" -I./src -I./src/device -I./src/http -I./src/notification -I./src/process -I./src/protocols -I./src/ssl -I./src/terminal -I./libmonit/src   -Wno-address -Wno-pointer-sign -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wunused -Wno-u
nused-label -funsigned-char -D_GNU_SOURCE -std=c99 -D _REENTRANT -I/usr/include -I/usr/include -c -o src/y.tab.o src/y.tab.c
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I./src    -DFREEBSD -DSYSCONFDIR="\"/usr/local/etc\"" -I./src -I./src/device -I./src/http -I./src/notification -I./src/process -I./src/protocols -I./src/ssl -I./src/terminal -I./libmonit/src   -Wno-address -Wno-pointer-sign -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wunused -Wno-u
nused-label -funsigned-char -D_GNU_SOURCE -std=c99 -D _REENTRANT -I/usr/include -I/usr/include -c -o src/lex.yy.o src/lex.yy.c
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I./src    -DFREEBSD -DSYSCONFDIR="\"/usr/local/etc\"" -I./src -I./src/device -I./src/http -I./src/notification -I./src/process -I./src/protocols -I./src/ssl -I./src/terminal -I./libmonit/src   -Wno-address -Wno-pointer-sign -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wunused -Wno-u
nused-label -funsigned-char -D_GNU_SOURCE -std=c99 -D _REENTRANT -I/usr/include -I/usr/include -c -o src/monit.o src/monit.c
/bin/sh: no: not found
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -I. -I./src    -DFREEBSD -DSYSCONFDIR="\"/usr/local/etc\"" -I./src -I./src/device -I./src/http -I./src/notification -I./src/process -I./src/protocols -I./src/ssl -I./src/terminal -I./libmonit/src   -Wno-address -Wno-pointer-sign -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector -fno-strict-aliasing -Wall -Wunused -Wno-u
nused-label -funsigned-char -D_GNU_SOURCE -std=c99 -D _REENTRANT -I/usr/include -I/usr/include -c -o src/alert.o src/alert.c
gmake[3]: *** [Makefile:1279: monit.1] Error 127
gmake[3]: *** Waiting for unfinished jobs....
gmake[3]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/monit/work/monit-5.21.0'
gmake[2]: *** [Makefile:804: all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/monit/work/monit-5.21.0'
gmake[1]: *** [Makefile:517: all] Error 2
gmake[1]: Leaving directory '/wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/monit/work/monit-5.21.0'
===> Compilation failed unexpectedly.
Try to set MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes and rebuild before reporting the failure to
the maintainer.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/sysutils/monit
====>> Cleaning up wrkdir
===>  Cleaning for monit-5.21.0
build of sysutils/monit ended at Mon Mar 13 09:40:58 CET 2017
build time: 00:00:09
!!! build failure encountered !!!

=== End ===

I believe the error is indicated by this line:
/bin/sh: no: not found

Greetings,
Torsten
